title: clematis dubia
intro: Clematis dubia, also known as the 'False Clematis', is a flowering plant that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Clematis dubia include reducing fever, treating wounds, and managing various health conditions such as arthritis and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Clematis dubia can be found in decoctions, infusions, and ointments, often used to promote wound healing and alleviate pain.
